briefdescription.para: Valid for all scripts. i.e white space or ' '.
ASCII digits.
ASCII punctuation and symbols.
Controls of the C1 Controls and Latin-1 Supplement unicode block.
Punctuation and symbols of the C1 Controls and Latin-1 Supplement unicode block.
Math symbols of the C1 Controls and Latin-1 Supplement unicode block.
Punctuation symbols of the Spacing Modifier Letters unicode block.
Uralic phonetic symbols of the Phonetic Extensions unicode block.
Subscripts and superscripts of the Phonetic Extensions unicode block.
Numeric subscripts and superscripts.
Symbols of the Letterlike unicode block.
Number Forms unicode block.
Numeric fraction symbols of the Number Forms unicode block.
Non latin symbols within the Latin Extended D unicode block.
Non latin symbols within the Halfwidth and fullwidth unicode block.
The Cyrillic script. Used by Russian, Bulgarian, Ukrainian, Macedonian, ...
The Greek script. Used by Greek.
The latin script. Used by many western languages and others around the world.
The arabic script. Used by Arab and Urdu among others.
The Hebrew script. Used by the Hebrew, Yiddish, Ladino, and Judeo-Arabic.
The Armenian script. Used by Armenian.
The Georgian script. Used by Georgian.
The CJK script. Used by Chinese, Japanese, Korean and Vietnamese(old writing system).
The Hangul jamo script. Used by Korean.
The Hiragana script. Used by the Japanese.
The Katakana script. Used by the Japanese.
The Bopomofo script. Also called Zhuyin fuhao or Zhuyin. A phonetic notation used for the transcription of spoken Chinese.
The Bengali script. Used by Bangla, Assamese, Bishnupriya Manipuri, Daphla, Garo, Hallam, Khasi, Mizo, Munda, Naga, Rian, and Santali.
The Burmese script. Used by the Burmese (Myanmar) language.
The devanagari script. Used by Hindi, Marathi, Sindhi, Nepali and Sanskrit.
The Gujarati script. Used by Gujarati.
The Gurmukhi script. Used by Punjabi.
The Kannada script. Used by Kannada and Tulu.
The Malayalam script. Used by Malayalam.
The Oriya script. Used by Oriya (Odia), Khondi, and Santali.
The Sinhala script. Used by Sinhala and Pali.
The Tamil script. Used by Tamil, Badaga, and Saurashtra.
The Telugu script. Used by Telugu, Gondi, and Lambadi.
The Lao script. Used by the Lao language.
The Thai script. Used by the Thai language.
The Khmer script. Used by the Khmer language.
The Javanese script. Used by the Javanese language.
The Sundanese script. Used by the Sundanese language.
The Ge'ez script. Used by the Amharic, Tigrinya and other languages in Ethiopia and Eritrea.
The Ol Chiki script. Used by the Santali.
The Baybayin script. Used by the Tagalog, Bikol languages, Ilocano, Pangasinan, Visayan and other languages in Philippines.
The Meitei script used for the Meitei language in Manipur, India.
The Emoji which map to standardized Unicode characters.
Some symbols.
Some symbols.
Some symbols.
Some symbols.
Some symbols.
The script is unknown.
The Emoji request a text presentation for an emoji character.
The Emoji request a color-emoji presentation for an emoji character.
THe Negative Squared Latin Capital Letter.
Script is the writing system used by a language. Typically one script can be used to write different languages although one language could be written in different scrips.
Text must be broken into a new line.
Is possible to break the text into a new line.
Text can't be broken into a new line.
A UTF-8/16 sequence is unfinished.
End of input on a non-EOL char.
Text can be broken with adding hyphen.
Enumerates the possible line break info values.
Text can be broken into a new word.
Text can't be broken into a new word.
Enumerates the possible word break info values.
Glyph stored as pixels.
Glyph stored as vectors (scalable). This feature requires highp shader support and is not available on all platforms.
No blend.
The color is multiplied by another one.
Defines how a color is blended.
The unique identifier for a font face (generated by FontClient)
The point size in 26.6 fractional points.
Used with fonts which allow several font faces.
Uniquely identifies a glyph within a particular font.
A UTF-32 representation of a character.
An index into an array of characters.
The length of an array.
Index to the bidirectional info for a paragraph.
Line break info (must break, allow break, no break).
Word break info (break, no break).
The character's direction: false is left to right, true is right to left.
An index into an array of colors.
Combining Enclosing Keycap. https://unicode-table.com/en/1F1E6/.
Emoji CompOnent Bald. https://unicode-table.com/en/1F9B2/.
Emoji CompOnent Red Hair. https://unicode-table.com/en/1F9B0/.
Emoji CompOnent Curly Hair. https://unicode-table.com/en/1F9B1/.
Emoji CompOnent White Hair. https://unicode-table.com/en/1F9B3/.
Regional Indicator Symbol Letter A. https://unicode-table.com/en/1F1E6/.
Regional Indicator Symbol Letter Z. https://unicode-table.com/en/1F1FF/.
Variation Selector-15. https://unicode-table.com/en/FE0E/.
Variation Selector-16. https://unicode-table.com/en/FE0F/.
Stateful tag terminator: Cancel Tag. https://unicode-table.com/en/E007F/.
Tag components: Tag Space. The first tag in tag_spec https://unicode-table.com/en/E0020/.
Tag components: Tag Tilde. The last tag in tag_spec https://unicode-table.com/en/E007E/.
Emoji Modifier Fitzpatrick Type-1-2 (Light Skin Tone). https://unicode-table.com/en/1F3FB/.
Emoji Modifier Fitzpatrick Type-3 (Medium-Light Skin Tone). https://unicode-table.com/en/1F3FC/.
Emoji Modifier Fitzpatrick Type-4 (Medium Skin Tone). https://unicode-table.com/en/1F3FD/.
Emoji Modifier Fitzpatrick Type-5 (Medium-Dark Skin Tone). https://unicode-table.com/en/1F3FE/.
Emoji Modifier Fitzpatrick Type-6 (Dark Skin Tone). https://unicode-table.com/en/1F3FF/.
North East White Arrow. https://unicode-table.com/en/2B00/.
Hellschreiber Pause Symbol . https://unicode-table.com/en/2BFF/.
Black Safety Scissors. https://unicode-table.com/en/2700/.
Double Curly Loop Emoji . https://unicode-table.com/en/27BF/.
0 Digit Zero. https://unicode-table.com/en/0030/
9 Digit Nine. https://unicode-table.com/en/0039/
Space. https://unicode-table.com/en/0020/.
/ Solidus. https://unicode-table.com/en/002F/
: Colon. https://unicode-table.com/en/003A/
@ Commercial At. https://unicode-table.com/en/0040/
[ Left Square Bracket. https://unicode-table.com/en/005B/
` Grave Accent. https://unicode-table.com/en/0060/
{ Left Curly Bracket. https://unicode-table.com/en/007B/
~ Tilde. https://unicode-table.com/en/007E/
Zero width space.
Whether the character is emoji component. Emoji Properties and Data Files: https://www.unicode.org/reports/tr51/#Emoji_Properties_and_Data_Files.

simplesect.para: True for characters used in emoji sequences that normally do not appear on emoji keyboards as separate choices, such as keycap base characters or Regional_Indicator characters.
true if the character is emoji component.

briefdescription.para: Whether the character is emoji modifier. Emoji Properties and Data Files: https://www.unicode.org/reports/tr51/#Emoji_Properties_and_Data_Files.

simplesect.para: true if the character is emoji modifier.

briefdescription.para: Whether the character is COMBINING ENCLOSING KEYCAP. Combining Enclosing Keycap: https://emojipedia.org/combining-enclosing-keycap/.

simplesect.para: The Codepoint of COMBINING ENCLOSING KEYCAP is {U+20E3}
true if the character is COMBINING ENCLOSING KEYCAP.

briefdescription.para: Whether the character is Regional Indicator. Regional Indicator Symbol Letter A: https://emojipedia.org/regional-indicator-symbol-letter-a/ Regional Indicator Symbol Letter Z: https://emojipedia.org/regional-indicator-symbol-letter-z/.

simplesect.para: The Codepoints of Regional Indicator Symbol Letters [A-Z] are [U+1F1E6 - U+1F1FF]
true if the character is Regional Indicator.

briefdescription.para: Whether the character is text presentation selector (VARIATION SELECTOR-15). Text Presentation Selector: https://www.unicode.org/reports/tr51/#def_text_presentation_selector.

simplesect.para: The character U+FE0E VARIATION SELECTOR-15 (VS15), used to request a text presentation for an emoji character. Also known as text variation selector.
true if the character is text presentation selector (VARIATION SELECTOR-15).

briefdescription.para: Whether the character is emoji variation selector (VARIATION SELECTOR-16). Emoji Presentation Selector: https://www.unicode.org/reports/tr51/#def_emoji_presentation_selector.

simplesect.para: The character U+FE0F VARIATION SELECTOR-16 (VS16), used to request an emoji presentation for an emoji character. Also known as emoji variation selector.
true if the character is emoji presentation selector (VARIATION SELECTOR-16).

briefdescription.para: Whether the character is tag spec. Emoji Tag Sequence (ETS): https://www.unicode.org/reports/tr51/#def_emoji_tag_sequence.

simplesect.para: The tag_spec consists of all characters from U+E0020 TAG SPACE to U+E007E TAG TILDE. Each tag_spec defines a particular visual variant to be applied to the tag_base character(s). Though tag_spec includes the values U+E0041 TAG LATIN CAPITAL LETTER A .. U+E005A TAG LATIN CAPITAL LETTER Z, they are not used currently and are reserved for future extensions.
true if the character is tag spec.

briefdescription.para: Whether the character is tag end. Emoji Tag Sequence (ETS): https://www.unicode.org/reports/tr51/#def_emoji_tag_sequence.

simplesect.para: The tag_end consists of the character U+E007F CANCEL TAG, and must be used to terminate the tag sequence.
true if the character is tag end.

briefdescription.para: Whether the character is emoji-component | emoji-modifier | COMBINING-ENCLOSING-KEYCAP | regional-indicator | TextPresentationSelector | EmojiPresentationSelector | TagSpec | TagEnd.

simplesect.para: true if the character is emoji-component | emoji-modifier | COMBINING-ENCLOSING-KEYCAP | regional-indicator | TextPresentationSelector | EmojiPresentationSelector | TagSpec | TagEnd.

briefdescription.para: Whether the character is Miscellaneous Symbols and Arrows emoji. Miscellaneous Symbols and Arrows emoji: https://unicode-table.com/en/blocks/miscellaneous-symbols-and-arrows/.

simplesect.para: The Range is 2B00—2BFF and the quantity of characters is 256.
true if the character is Miscellaneous Symbols and Arrows emoji.

briefdescription.para: Whether the character is Dingbats emoji. Dingbats emoji: https://unicode-table.com/en/blocks/dingbats/.

simplesect.para: The Range is 2700—27BF and the quantity of characters is 192.
true if the character is Dingbats emoji.

briefdescription.para: Whether the character is ASCII digits. ASCII digits: https://unicode-table.com/en/blocks/basic-latin/.

simplesect.para: The Range is 0030—0039 and the quantity of characters is 10.
true if the character is ASCII digits.

briefdescription.para: Whether the character is ASCII PS. ASCII PS: https://unicode-table.com/en/blocks/basic-latin/.

simplesect.para: The Range is 0020-007E
true if the character is ASCII PS.

briefdescription.para: Whether the character is emoji-variation-sequences. Emoji Variation Sequences for UTS #51: https://www.unicode.org/Public/14.0.0/ucd/emoji/emoji-variation-sequences.txt.

simplesect.para: true if the character is emoji-variation-sequences.

briefdescription.para: Whether the character is Negative Squared Latin Capital Letter. Read more at White on black squared Latin letters: https://unicode-table.com/en/blocks/enclosed-alphanumeric-supplement/.

simplesect.para: true if the character is Negative Squared Latin Capital Letter.

briefdescription.para: Whether the script is symbol.

simplesect.para: Check whether the script is in [SYMBOLS1, SYMBOLS2, SYMBOLS3, SYMBOLS4, SYMBOLS5]
true if the script is symbol.

briefdescription.para: Whether the script is EMOJI.

simplesect.para: true if the script is EMOJI.

briefdescription.para: Whether the script is EMOJI_TEXT.

simplesect.para: true if the script is EMOJI_TEXT.

briefdescription.para: Whether the script is EMOJI_COLOR.

simplesect.para: true if the script is EMOJI_COLOR.

briefdescription.para: Whether the script is EMOJI | EMOJI_COLOR| EMOJI_TEXT.

simplesect.para: true if the script is EMOJI | EMOJI_COLOR| EMOJI_TEXT.

briefdescription.para: Whether the script is symbol or emoji.

simplesect.para: At least one of IsSymbol and IsEmoji is true.
true if the script is symbol or emoji.

briefdescription.para: Whether the script is SYMBOL | EMOJI | TEXT.

simplesect.para: At least one of IsSymbol and IsEmoji and IsText is true.
true if the script is SYMBOL | EMOJI | EMOJI_COLOR| EMOJI_TEXT.

briefdescription.para: Retrieve the unicode for invisible glyphs.

simplesect.para: Used CHAR_ZWS it is the unicode for Zero Width Space character
Retrieve the unicode for Zero Width Space character

briefdescription.para: This is used to improve application launch performance.

simplesect.para: A pre-initialized FontClient

memberdef.argsstring: (const FontFamilyList &fallbackFamilyList, const FontFamilyList &extraFamilyList, const FontFamily &localeFamily, bool useThread, bool syncCreation)
memberdef.name: FontClientPreCache

briefdescription.para: This is used to pre-cache FontConfig in order to improve the runtime performance of the application.

parameterdescription.para: A list of fallback font families to be pre-cached.
A list of additional font families to be pre-cached.
A locale font family to be pre-cached.
True if the font client should create thread and perform pre-caching, false otherwise.
True if thread creation guarantees syncronization with the main thread, false async creation.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FontPathList &fontPathList, const FontPathList &memoryFontPathList, bool useThread, bool syncCreation)
memberdef.name: FontClientFontPreLoad

briefdescription.para: This is used to pre-load FreeType font face in order to improve the runtime performance of the application.

detaileddescription.para:
fontPathList
A list of font paths to be pre-loaded.
memoryFontPathList
A list of memory font paths to be pre-loaded.
useThread
True if the font client should create thread and perform font pre-loading, false otherwise.
syncCreation
True if thread creation guarantees syncronization with the main thread, false async creation.
The fonts in the fontPathList perform FT_New_Face during pre-loading, which can provide some performace benefits.
The fonts in the memoryFontPathList read the font file and cache the buffer in memory during pre-load. This enables the use of FT_New_Memory_Face during runtime and provides a performance boost. It requires memory equivalent to the size of each font file.

briefdescription.para: Joins font threads, waiting for their execution to complete.
Ensure the locale of the font client.

simplesect.para: If there is no locale information, update it using setlocale().

briefdescription.para: Gets the current language.

simplesect.para: Returns the language code. (e.g., "en")
The current language.

briefdescription.para: Gets the current locale identifier.

simplesect.para: Returns the locale identifier. (e.g., "en_US")
The current locale identifier.

briefdescription.para: Sets the current locale.

simplesect.para: Update language and locale identifier.

briefdescription.para: Enable font specific design compatibility mode globally.

detaileddescription.para: When enabled, FontMetrics will adjust ascender/descender values at construction to ensure design compatibility rules.

simplesect.para: This is a one-way switch. Once enabled, it cannot be disabled again during the lifetime of the process. This function must be called before any text is rendered.

briefdescription.para: Whether DesignCompatibility is enabled or not.
Whether the script is a right to left script.

simplesect.para: true if the script is right to left.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves a character's script.

simplesect.para: The chraracter's script.

briefdescription.para: Whether the character is a white space.

simplesect.para: true if the character is a white space.

briefdescription.para: Whether the character is a space.

simplesect.para: true if the character is a space.

briefdescription.para: Whether the character is a new paragraph character.

simplesect.para: true if the character is a new paragraph character.

briefdescription.para: Whether the character is a zero width non joiner.

simplesect.para: true if the character is a zero width non joiner.

briefdescription.para: Whether the character is a zero width joiner.

simplesect.para: true if the character is a zero width joiner.

briefdescription.para: Whether the character is a zero width space.

simplesect.para: true if the character is a zero width space.

briefdescription.para: Whether the character is a left to right mark.

simplesect.para: true if the character is a left to right mark.

briefdescription.para: Whether the character is a right to left mark.

simplesect.para: true if the character is a right to left mark.

briefdescription.para: Whether the character is a thin space.

simplesect.para: true if the character is a thin space.

briefdescription.para: Whether the character is common within all scripts.

simplesect.para: true if the character is common within all scripts.

briefdescription.para: Whether the script contains ligatures that must be 'broken' for selection or cursor position.

detaileddescription.para: i.e The latin script has the 'ff' or 'fi' ligatures that need to be broken to position the cursor between the two characters. Equally the arabic script has the 'ﻻ' ligature that needs to be broken.

simplesect.para: true if the script has ligatures that must be 'broken'.

briefdescription.para: Get the number of elements in enum Script.

simplesect.para: returns the number of Scripts

briefdescription.para: Whether the character is a combining diacritical marks.

simplesect.para: true if the character is a combining diacritical marks.

briefdescription.para: Transforms a vertex to wrap a circular path.

parameterdescription.para: The parameters of the circular path.
